occurrence_sentence: Get Quantum Ready — The Quantum Daily is partnering with h-bar, a consultancy that specializes in quantum technology, to offer readers access to advisers with decades of collective experience and a global reach.
[TQD](https://thequantuminsider.com/consulting/) recently announced its partnership with [h-bar](http://www.h-bar.com.au/), a global pioneer in quantum computing and quantum technology advising.

Get Quantum Ready — The Quantum Daily is partnering with h-bar, a consultancy that specializes in quantum technology, to offer readers access to advisers with decades of collective experience and a global reach.
TQD recently announced its partnership with h-bar, a global pioneer in quantum computing and quantum technology advising.

We are extremely pleased to partner with TQD to provide expert services in this exciting and extremely impactful new field of technology development and we are confident that the information and data provided by TQD, combined with the in-depth expertise of h-bar, will allow many businesses to understand and exploit this revolutionary new area of quantum technology.
